column6: Straight south on 2nd Ring Road. About 20-30 CNY.
Line 2 from Qianmen to Tiantan Dongmen. 3 CNY.
Highway drive. 200-300 CNY one way. Arrange round trip with driver.
Line 8 from Shichahai, 2 stops. Or pleasant 25-min walk north through hutongs.
Walk north through Jingshan Park and hutong alleys. Scenic route.
Line 2 direct. The monorail ride itself is part of the experience.
Hongya Cave is right next to Jiefangbei. Easy walk.
Cableway station is a short walk from Hongya Cave along the river.
18 Steps entrance is just south of Jiefangbei.
Line 1 from Liziba area to Ciqikou. About 6 stops.
